drl:
rule "R0"
salience -5
when
    $p0_0 : T1(f1 != true || f1 != true, $b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f1)
    T0(f2 != true, f2 == false, $b0_1_0 : f2, $b0_1_1 : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new T2($b0_1_1, "alpha"));
    insert(new T2($p0_0.getF0(), "a"));
end
rule "R1"
salience 2
when
    $p1_0 : T1(f1 != true || f1 != true, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
    T0(f2 != true, f2 == false, $b1_1_0 : f2, $b1_1_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
salience 6
when
    ( not T2(f0 in (-1)) )
    or
    ( not T2(f0 in (-1)) )
    or
    ( not T2(f0 > -2) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2(-1, "alpha"));
end
rule "R3"
no-loop
when
    not T2(f0 >= -3.0)
    $a3_1 : ArrayList() from collect( T2(f1 in ("ab"), f0 >= 8) )
    T0(f1 in (-4, 100, 7), $b3_2_0 : f2, $b3_2_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T2(f1 >= "b", f1 not in ("", ""))
    accumulate( T2(f0 in (0, 2, -2.5), f1 contains "et", $s4_1 : f0); $a4_1 : sum($s4_1) )
    accumulate( T0(f0 < -1.5, f1 == $a4_1, $s4_2 : f0); $a4_2 : max($s4_2) )
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T2($b5_0_0 : f1)
    T0(f1 >= 5, f0 < -1.0, $b5_1_0 : f0)
then
end
